title: dt-pilot reflected Terraform-resource catalog
description: Schema for config/catalog/terraform.json -- the curated list of dynatrace-oss/dynatrace provider resource types that dt-pilot ships scaffolds for under modules/terraform/configs/.

resourceType.description: Terraform resource type identifier; must start with 'dynatrace_' (the dynatrace-oss/dynatrace provider's prefix).

commonVariables.description: Variables the generator should pre-declare in the scaffold's variables.tf.example. Each item lists the variable's HCL identifier, type, and a human description.

providerArgument.description: Optional. The provider's actual top-level argument name to assign this variable to in main.tf.example (e.g. 'name' for dynatrace_management_zone_v2 whose variable is 'zone_name'). When omitted, the scaffold falls back to '<name> = var.<name>' with a TODO marker. Omit entirely when the variable maps into a nested block or has no clean top-level analogue.
